## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go run ./cmd/benchmark` (if diagnosis or fixtures changed)
- [ ] `go build -o bin/pipeline-mcp ./cmd/pipeline-mcp`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for user-facing or operator-facing changes.
- [ ] AI-assisted commits include `AI-assisted-by` trailers with the tool and model used.
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive logs were added.
- [ ] Follow-up GitHub settings changes are called out, if any.
